word: G563 - ἀπερισπάστως - aperispástōs - ap-er-is-pas-toce' - Without distraction

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from a compound of G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4049; undistractedly, that is, free from (domestic) solicitude: - without distraction.
